title: SQL: overflow values silently truncated to 0
poc:
CREATE TABLE "sys"."rawtriples" (
         "id"           int(19)  NOT NULL,
         "subjns"       int(19)  NOT NULL,
         "subjlname"    varchar(255)     NOT NULL,
         "predns"       int(19)  NOT NULL,
         "predlname"    varchar(255)     NOT NULL,
         "objns"        int(19)  NOT NULL,
         "objlname"     varchar(255)     NOT NULL,
         "objlabelhash" int(19),
         "objlang"      varchar(16),
         "objlabel"     varchar,
         "objisliteral" boolean
 );
key_bug_features: Overflow values truncated to zero during SQL insert
bug_features_seed:
CREATE TABLE "sys"."rawtriples" (
         "id"           int(19)  NOT NULL,
         "subjns"       int(19)  NOT NULL,
         "subjlname"    varchar(255)     NOT NULL,
         "predns"       int(19)  NOT NULL,
         "predlname"    varchar(255)     NOT NULL,
         "objns"        int(19)  NOT NULL,
         "objlname"     varchar(255)     NOT NULL,
         "objlabelhash" int(19),
         "objlang"      varchar(16),
         "objlabel"     varchar,
         "objisliteral" boolean
 );
INSERT INTO rawtriples VALUES(1001, 1, '100168990', 2, 'glossaryEntry', 0, '', -5342185907394955428, NULL, 'adorning with mosaic', true);
INSERT INTO rawtriples VALUES(1002, 2, 'example', 3, 'predicate', 1, 'object', 2147483648, 'en', 'example label', false);
SELECT id, subjns, predns, objlabelhash, objisliteral FROM rawtriples WHERE objlabelhash IS NULL;
UPDATE rawtriples SET objlabelhash = -1 WHERE id = 1001;
